# CHE-0022 hard-cut snapshot for gh_report::domain::events::DomainEvent.
#
# Format: one record per line, `<VariantName>: <comma-separated sorted field names>`.
# Empty lines and lines starting with `#` are ignored.
#
# Rules (CHE-0022:R1/R2/R3 — see docs/adr/cherry/CHE-0022):
#   - Adding new variants     → allowed (additive). Add a new line here.
#   - Adding new fields       → allowed if `#[serde(default)]`. Append the field
#                               to the variant's sorted field list here.
#   - Renaming/removing       → forbidden. Falsifier (event_schema_append_only)
#                               will fail with a CHE-0022-violation message.
#
# Update procedure: when the falsifier reports "additive change detected",
# copy the suggested new line(s) into this file in the same sorted order
# and re-run. Cite CHE-0022 in the commit message.
RepositoryStateCaptured: domain_key, evidence, presence, repo_name, timestamp
